rulings.Case Title: HAROLD BURTON et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Curtiss-Wright Corporation'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 25, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT CURTISS-WRIGHT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS BY VIRTUE OF THE TUKESBREY AND THOMPSON DECLARATIONS. =(302/PJB/PB)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK R MCMAHON VS. PIER 39 LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Dismissing Action
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 25, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANT PIER 39 LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S Motion For Order Dismissing Action IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT OBTAIN AN ORDER PERMITTING THIS CASE TO BE FILED. A CLERK'S TELEPHONE CALL, EVEN ASSUMING IF OCCURRED, WOULD NOT CONSTITUTE AN ORDER FOR PURPOSES OF CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.7(C). =(302/PJB/KD)
